name: stm32f030c8t6_pre_stage2_connectivity
description: STM32F030C8T6 pre-Stage2 connectivity pack on local DAPLink/SWD with local jumper wiring. Confirms PA0<->PA1, PB0<->PB1, PB8<->PB9, and local PA9<->PA10 UART loopback before Stage 2 peripheral tests are added. DAPLink UART-observed tests move to a later separate pack.
